name: telecommunications_cross_border_data_harbor_tru_loy
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications cross border data harbor tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Gideon Dubois
agents.identity: I am Gideon Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Ansel Okoye
agents.identity: I am Ansel Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Gideon Dubois must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Gideon Dubois do?
